agent_summary: Customer claims to have mistakenly sent 2000 BDT to the wrong person (TXN-9202). However, transaction history shows prior transfers to the same recipient, making the 'wrong person' claim inconsistent with past behavior.
recommended_next_action: Investigate the customer's claim of wrong recipient for TXN-9202, considering the history of prior transfers to the same number. Advise the customer on the dispute resolution process and potential next steps.
customer_reply: Dear customer, thank you for contacting us regarding your transfer of 2000 BDT (Transaction ID: TXN-9202) which you believe was sent to the wrong person. We understand your concern and have initiated an investigation into Ticket ID: TKT-002. Please note that any eligible amount will be processed through official channels. We will keep you updated on the progress.
